imageConvert.webpToPngDesc: Batch convert WebP images to PNG format. Supports multiple images, direct download or zip archive.
imageConvert.webpToJpgDesc: Batch convert WebP images to JPG format. Supports multiple images, direct download or zip archive.
imageConvert.description: Select one or more images (WebP, PNG, JPG, JPEG, BMP, GIF, TIFF) and convert to your desired format. Supports batch processing and zip download.
